OPERA_AI_METADATA.AI_AUTO_DESCRIPTION: Product review. A close-up of a pink lipstick swatch with a smooth texture, displayed on a white background. The swatch shows a gradient effect with a thicker application on one end and a lighter, blended finish on the other.
